query: SELECT id, code, title, status FROM curriculumTopics WHERE (subject='Math' AND code LIKE 'Math 16-%') OR (subject='Science') ORDER BY subject, ord;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, code, title, status FROM curriculumTopics WHERE (subject='Math' AND code LIKE 'Math 16-%') OR (subject='Science') ORDER BY subject, ord;
